message:
fix(lab): propagate task_id from AtPoint strategy in CancellationInjector

CancellationInjector::with_strategy() was unconditionally setting
task_id to None, discarding the task_id embedded in an AtPoint
injection point. This meant targeted cancellation injection could not
filter by task when created via with_strategy(AtPoint(...)).

Now extracts the task_id from the AtPoint variant's AwaitPoint and
stores it on the injector, matching the behavior callers expect when
specifying a targeted injection point.

Also adds a test verifying task_id preservation and a beads history
snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
